question: Who was the father of Isaac
answer: Abraham
verse: Who was the father of Isaac? Abraham

question: By whom was Salmon the father of Boaz
answer: Rahab
verse: By whom was Salmon the father of Boaz? Rahab

question: ftv/quote
answer: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
verse: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

question: Where was Jesus born
answer: Bethlehem of Judea
verse: Now after Jesus was born in Bethlehem of Judea in the days of Herod the king...

question: What did John the Baptist wear
answer: A garment of camel's hair and a leather belt
verse: Now John wore a garment of camel's hair and a leather belt around his waist...

question: What did Jesus say he would make Peter and Andrew
answer: Fishers of men
verse: And he said to them, 'Follow me, and I will make you fishers of men.'

question: ftv/quote
answer: But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you.
verse: But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you.

question: Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; what else
answer: Knock, and it will be opened to you
verse: Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock, and it will be opened to you.

question: Foxes have holes, and birds of the air have nests, but what about the Son of Man
answer: The Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head
verse: And Jesus said to him, 'Foxes have holes, and birds of the air have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head.'

question: Where was Matthew sitting when Jesus called him
answer: At the tax booth
verse: As Jesus passed on from there, he saw a man called Matthew sitting at the tax booth...

question: Who was the first of the twelve apostles
answer: Simon, who is called Peter
verse: The names of the twelve apostles are these: first, Simon, who is called Peter...

question: ftv/quote
answer: Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
verse: Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.

question: Who is Lord of the Sabbath
answer: The Son of Man
verse: For the Son of Man is lord of the Sabbath.

question: To what is the kingdom of heaven compared in the parable of the seed
answer: A grain of mustard seed
verse: He put another parable before them, saying, 'The kingdom of heaven is like a grain of mustard seed...'

question: What did Jesus say to the disciples when he walked on the water
answer: Take heart; it is I. Do not be afraid
verse: But immediately Jesus spoke to them, saying, 'Take heart; it is I. Do not be afraid.'

question: Even the dogs eat what from their masters' table
answer: The crumbs
verse: She said, 'Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table.'

question: What was Peter's answer to 'Who do you say that I am'
answer: You are the Christ, the Son of the living God
verse: Simon Peter replied, 'You are the Christ, the Son of the living God.'

question: What happened to Jesus' face during the Transfiguration
answer: It shone like the sun
verse: And he was transfigured before them, and his face shone like the sun...

question: ftv/quote
answer: For where two or three are gathered in my name, there am I among them.
verse: For where two or three are gathered in my name, there am I among them.

question: What did Jesus say about the little children
answer: Let the little children come to me and do not hinder them
verse: But Jesus said, 'Let the little children come to me and do not hinder them...'

question: The last will be first, and what
answer: The first last
verse: So the last will be first, and the first last.

question: What did the crowds shout as Jesus entered Jerusalem
answer: Hosanna to the Son of David
verse: And the crowds that went before him and that followed him were shouting, 'Hosanna to the Son of David!'

question: Which is the great commandment
answer: You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart
verse: And he said to him, 'You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul...'

question: Whoever exalts himself will be humbled, and whoever does what
answer: Humbles himself will be exalted
verse: Whoever exalts himself will be humbled, and whoever humbles himself will be exalted.

question: Heaven and earth will pass away, but what will not
answer: My words
verse: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.

question: As you did it to one of the least of these my brothers, you did it to whom
answer: You did it to me
verse: 'Truly, I say to you, as you did it to one of the least of these my brothers, you did it to me.'

question: Before the rooster crows, what will Peter do
answer: Deny me three times
verse: Jesus said to him, 'Truly, I tell you, this very night, before the rooster crows, you will deny me three times.'

question: What does 'Eli, Eli, lema sabachthani' mean
answer: My God, my God, why have you forsaken me
verse: And about the ninth hour Jesus cried out with a loud voice, saying, 'Eli, Eli, lema sabachthani?' that is, 'My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?'

question: What did the angel say about Jesus at the tomb
answer: He is not here, for he has risen
verse: He is not here, for he has risen, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay.

question: ftv/quote
answer: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.
verse: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.
